displayNameZh: 先从服务做起，累积经验和作品
summary: Yt Start With Service component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的「先从服务做起，累积经验和作品」组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/yt-start-with-service/src/YtStartWithService.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `YtStartWithService` and `ytStartWithServiceDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Yt Start With Service Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/yt-start-with-service to my project. Preserve the exported YtStartWithServiceProps API and register the YtStartWithService composition with the default props.
